title: sisymbrium ochroleucum
intro: Sisymbrium ochroleucum, also known as yellow-horned poppy or yellow horned cuckoo flower, is a species of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Sisymbrium ochroleucum include its potential to aid in reducing fever, relieving coughs, and treating respiratory infections. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
